g.text: Visualizes the calculated travel route on the map before

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Confirms the displayed route and proceeds to the next step.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Find Ride → Displays matching available rides.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Find Ride: Allows users to search for rides based on their travel requirements.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Start Location: Specify the pickup location where the journey begins.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Destination Location: Specify the destination where the user wants to travel.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Swap Locations: Interchange the pickup and destination locations with a single click.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Date & Time: Select the preferred travel date and departure time.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Seat Requirement: Choose the number of seats required for the journey.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Recurring Ride: Search for rides on selected weekdays using a recurring schedule.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Find Ride Button: Searches for rides matching the entered travel details.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Route Information: Displays the selected pickup and destination locations for verification.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Route Preview: Shows the calculated route on an interactive map.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Confirm: Confirms the displayed route and proceeds to the next step.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Offer Ride: Allows users to publish rides for other employees.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Start Location: Specify the pickup location for the ride.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Destination Location: Specify the destination where the ride will end.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Swap Locations: Interchange the pickup and destination locations.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Date & Time: Select the departure date and time.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Available Seats: Specify the number of seats available for passengers.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Fare Per Seat: Displays the fare charged per passenger and the remaining available seats.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Publish Ride: Publishes the ride, making it available for booking.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Available Rides: Displays all rides matching the selected travel route and schedule.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Ride Details: Shows the driver's information, route, departure time, fare per seat, and available seats.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Book Now: Confirms the selected ride and adds it to My Trips.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: More Options: Provides additional ride-related actions such as viewing ride details or reporting an issue.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Refresh: Reloads the available rides to display the latest matching results.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Track Ride: Displays the current trip and allows users to monitor the journey in real time.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Trip Information: Shows the pickup location, destination, driver details, and assigned vehicle information.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Live Route: Displays the vehicle's current location and travel route on the interactive map.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: ETA: Shows the estimated arrival time and trip progress.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Page Purpose: Enables passengers and drivers to monitor the trip until the destination is reached.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Trip Details: Displays complete information about the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: booked ride, including driver, vehicle, route, and schedule.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Driver Information: Shows the assigned driver's details for the booked ride.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Vehicle Information: Displays the assigned vehicle details used for the trip.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Pickup & Drop Points: Shows the confirmed boarding and destination locations.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Chat with Driver: Allows passengers to communicate with the driver for trip-related updates.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Call to Driver: Initiates a phone call for quick coordination before or during the trip.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Page Purpose: Enables users to view and manage an upcoming or active trip.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Trip Summary: Displays the completed trip information, including route,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Trip Details: Shows the confirmed pickup and destination locations after

Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Fare Details: Displays the total fare to be paid for the completed journey.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Pay Now: Redirects users to the payment module to complete the ride payment.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Page Purpose: Allows users to review the completed trip and proceed with payment.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Payment Method: Allows users to choose their preferred payment option for

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Payment Options: Supports payment through Cash, Card, UPI, or Wallet.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: UPI Payment: Allows users to pay using a UPI ID or by scanning the QR code.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Pay Button: Initiates the payment process and completes the ride transaction.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Page Purpose: Enables users to securely complete payment for a finished trip.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Wallet Balance: Displays the current available wallet balance.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Recharge Amount: Specify the amount to be added to the wallet.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Recharge Method: Select Card or UPI as the preferred payment method.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: UPI Payment: Allows users to recharge the wallet using a UPI ID or QR code.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Add Money: Adds the specified amount to the wallet upon successful payment.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Page Purpose: Allows users to recharge their wallet for faster and cashless ride payments.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Ride History: Displays a record of all completed rides.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Trip Details: Shows the rider/driver, route, vehicle information, and trip

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Trip Record: Allows users to review their previous journeys for

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Page Purpose: Maintains a history of completed rides and travel records.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: My Vehicle: Displays all vehicles registered by the user for ride sharing.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Vehicle Details: Shows the vehicle model, registration number, and assigned driver role.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Add Vehicle: Allows users to register a new vehicle before publishing rides.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Manage Vehicle: Update or remove registered vehicle information whenever required.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Page Purpose: Enables users to manage vehicles used for offering rides.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Settings: Provides quick access to frequently used features and account preferences.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Quick Access: Navigate to My Trips, My Vehicle, Payment Methods, Ride History, Saved Places,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Help, and Chat from a single location.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Saved Places: Store frequently used pickup and destination locations for faster ride booking and publishing.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Help & Chat: Access support resources and communicate regarding application or trip-related queries.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Page Purpose: Centralizes application settings and frequently used modules for easier navigation.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Reports: Displays insights into travel activity, vehicle usage, and transportation costs.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Key Metrics: Shows summary statistics such as total fuel cost, profit, and vehicle utilization.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Analytics Charts: Visualizes fuel efficiency trends and vehicle-wise cost analysis.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Financial Summary: Provides a monthly overview of revenue, fuel expenses, maintenance costs, and net profit.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Page Purpose: Helps users and administrators monitor ride performance and transportation analytics.
